title: Nursery Rhyme. CXCVIII. Riddles.
content:
[A plum-pudding.]

        Flour of England, fruit of Spain,
        Met together in a shower of rain;
        Put in a bag tied round with a string,
        If you'll tell me this riddle, I'll give you a ring.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CXCVIII. Riddles.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
